caption: In a recording studio setting, a man is seated behind a microphone for a podcast. In the initial scene, he is wearing a white shirt with a bow tie and a tall, sculpted grey headpiece, while wearing headphones. He is positioned in front of a wall adorned with various framed photographs. As the scene progresses, the focus shifts to a different man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" and a black baseball cap. He also wears headphones and speaks into a professional microphone. On-screen graphics appear in several frames, including a logo that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and text that says "BOSS TALK 101". The background features a white wall with yellow stars and the words "GRIND HUSTLE" repeated vertically. The sequence transitions from the man in the headpiece to the man in the baseball cap, who remains the subject for the rest of the clip.
